initiative.name: HomoPlasticus WordPress-Aligned Rebuild
initiative.objective: Replace raw HTML page operations with a WordPress-native block-editor workflow and Abilities API canonical layer. Deliver a marketplace-releasable PHP plugin with MCP as a thin transport adapter on top.

stages.name: Milestone B — Core Packs + MCP + Governance
outputArtifacts: MCP Node server restructured as thin adapter
gates: principal approval of DB schema before WO-013 migration runs on production

stages.name: Milestone C — Ecosystem + Release
outputArtifacts: 5 Compat Packs (Yoast, ACF, Gravity Forms, WPML, UpdraftPlus)
gates: @systems-architect ADR required before WO-016 (Cloud Control Plane)
@verifier marketplace readiness check before WO-019 submission

doneCriteria: Plugin ai-foundry installs cleanly on WordPress 6.4+ and upgrades/uninstalls without orphan data
All 32 abilities registered and visible in /wp-json/ai-foundry/v1/discovery
Block editor patterns visible in HomoPlasticus theme Insert panel
MCP Node tools/list auto-populated from PHP ability registry — no hardcoded tool list in Node
content.propose-update returns absolute preview_url and canonical_url in all environments
Proposal/Approval DB FSM enforced: proposed → applied | rejected, applied → reverted
Every ability execution writes an audit event
Plugin zip passes WordPress Plugin Check (plugincheck.wp.net)
Extension SDK example pack installs and registers one working ability
